title: Career Opportunity Teacher at SSC Tube

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at SSC Tube
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
